title: Whisper of Ether
description: Customize your weapons and armor with runes, and new automatable magic blocks. Soon: magic and adventure. The whispers of magic are near.
body:
# Whisper of Ether
![Splash Art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8f00b8cbed10b5d48bdb56b8c67248461e062e1.webp)

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

# What is Whisper of Ether?
Whisper of Ether is a brand new mod introducing the **runic system**, allowing equipment customization through runes with unique stats like Multi Jump, Omnivampirism and Critical Strikes. Inspired by games like Dofus, enhancing one stat may reduce another.

Subsequently, WOE will introduce magic, quests, adventure, dungeons, and bosses.

## The Runic System
The core revolves around **runes** — mystical items that modify your equipment's statistics. A dedicated Creative Tab gives easy access to all runic content: all 5 tiers of blank runes and all Dragon Runes for each attribute.

![Tabs Creative and runes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/126a94fa792702afdbbccc8358164e7aba0d680b.png)

## Runic Table, Forge and Infuser
- **Runic Table** — Apply runes to your equipment, reducing some statistics to improve others.
- **Runic Forge** — Craft runes and items using specific recipes. Can be automated.
- **Runic Infuser** — Transform blank runes into stat-infused runes with a random statistic.

![Interface related to rune](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d9ebb01ebe40d0ab47722468b1304a1efb7c731.png)

## Training Dummy
A useful tool that displays the exact damage you deal, perfect for testing your builds. Cheap craft similar to the Armor Stand, shows damage numbers in real-time.

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

# Documentation
For detailed information about **Whisper of Ether**, runes, and all other Voxel creations, please refer to the documentation.

*Click on the image below to access the complete wiki. [Wiki Links](https://hardels-organization.gitbook.io/voxel)*

[![Documentation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baeded70d64657f66ab232f72a442e77cb4ce387_0.webp)](https://hardels-organization.gitbook.io/voxel)

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

# Support the Project
Join us on Patreon and help make Minecraft an even more amazing experience for everyone!
With more support, I can make tools for creators, players, and modders. I plan to create the **Hytale asset editor in Minecraft!**

[![Patreon](https://images.ctfassets.net/4rnblstkg79m/5TumqlgINUoJBVWFRRU6wz/e64dfea04fe5b19e60fa27310114853f/WolffOlins_Patreon.jpg)](https://www.patreon.com/hardel)
